title: Datadog の 500 エラー：原因と解決策
reasons: Most factual claims are supported by official Datadog documentation or reputable comparison sites.
The article correctly identifies common causes and solutions for Datadog 500 errors.
The editor's note regarding community observations aligns with some forum discussions, even if not directly from official documentation.
Some claims about specific API quotas are not explicitly listed in the generic rate limit documentation, but overall guidance aligns.

The batch size for metrics is stated as 500 in the article, while Datadog documentation mentions payload size limits (500KB or 3.2MB) rather than a fixed number of metrics per batch. This is a common practice but not a strict Datadog limit in terms of number of metrics. This is a slight discrepancy that is more of a 'best practice' recommendation in the article rather than a strict factual error.
The claim that exceeding rate limits 'may return a 500 error (or more accurately 429)' is accurate, as continuous exceeding can sometimes lead to different server responses.
citation coverage is below the threshold
freshness score is below the threshold
one or more claims are unsupported or unverifiable
no URLs resolved to known official domains
required_actions: Clarify the batch size recommendation (500 metrics) with a note that Datadog generally enforces payload size limits rather than a fixed number of items.
Add more specific official documentation links for API quota checks beyond the general 'Organization Settings -> API quota' if available for specific API types.
Add links to official documentation or primary sources for key claims.
Review current official docs and update changed API/spec/pricing details.
Add official or primary source URLs for unsupported claims.

sources.title: Datadog Status
sources.claim: 公式ステータスページで障害情報を確認 (Check for outage information on the official status page.)

sources.title: Datadog US1 Status - API
sources.claim: または curl を使用してステータス API を確認 curl -X GET https://status.datadoghq.com/api/v2/incidents.json (Or use curl to check the status API: curl -X GET https://status.datadoghq.com/api/v2/incidents.json)

sources.title: Submit metrics - Datadog Docs
sources.claim: 大量のメトリクス、ログ、またはイベントデータを一度に送信しようとすると、Datadog のサーバーが処理しきれず 500 エラーを返すことがあります。 (If you try to send a large amount of metrics, logs, or event data at once, Datadog's server may not be able to process it and return a 500 error.)

sources.title: Submit metrics - Datadog Docs
sources.claim: The maximum payload size is 500 kilobytes (512000 bytes). Compressed payloads must have a decompressed size of less than 5 megabytes (5242880 bytes).

sources.title: [Datadog] Payload too large · Issue #1925 · open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector-contrib - GitHub
sources.claim: The API payload size limit is 10mb I believe so it may be necessary to reduce the send_batch_size from it's default (8192).

sources.title: Failed to send metrics to datadog: Payload too big - Stack Overflow
sources.claim: The default Datadog batch size limit is 3MB.

sources.title: Validate API key - Datadog Docs
sources.claim: API キーまたはアプリケーションキーが無効、期限切れ、または不完全な場合、Datadog サーバーが認証処理で 500 エラーを返すことがあります。(If the API key or application key is invalid, expired, or incomplete, the Datadog server may return a 500 error during authentication processing.)

sources.title: Validate API key - Datadog Docs
sources.claim: 認証情報が正しいか検証 curl -X GET https://api.datadoghq.com/api/v1/validate (Validate credentials: curl -X GET https://api.datadoghq.com/api/v1/validate)

sources.title: Validate API key - Datadog Docs
sources.claim: Returns {"status": "ok"} on success, 401 or 403 otherwise.

sources.title: Rate Limits - Datadog Docs
sources.claim: Datadog API にはレート制限が設定されており、短時間に大量のリクエストを送信すると、制限に達した時点で 500 エラー（またはより正確には 429 Too Many Requests）が返されることがあります。(Datadog API has rate limits, and sending a large number of requests in a short time may result in a 500 error (or more accurately, 429 Too Many Requests) when the limit is reached.)

sources.title: 5 Steps to Handle API Rate Limits in Datadog
sources.claim: Datadog signals this with an HTTP 429 "Too Many Requests" status code and provides headers to guide your retry approach.

sources.title: Getting Started with Datadog Sites
sources.claim: Datadog は複数のリージョン（US、EU など）で運用されており、エンドポイントが異なります。例えば EU リージョンを使用している場合、API エンドポイントは `https://api.datadoghq.eu` である必要があります。(Datadog operates in multiple regions (US, EU, etc.), and endpoints differ. For example, if you are using the EU region, the API endpoint must be `https://api.datadoghq.eu`.)

sources.title: API Key invalid dropping transaction when installing Datadog agent - Stack Overflow
sources.claim: 誤ったリージョンのエンドポイントに送信すると 500 エラーが返される可能性があります。(Sending to an incorrect region endpoint may result in a 500 error.)

sources.title: Upgrade your Datadog Agent
sources.claim: Datadog Agent を使用している場合、Agent のバージョンが古すぎると通信プロトコルの不整合により 500 エラーが発生することがあります。(If using Datadog Agent, an excessively old Agent version may cause a 500 error due to communication protocol incompatibility.)

sources.title: Agent - Datadog Docs
sources.claim: Agent は定期的に最新版に更新することが推奨されます。(It is recommended to regularly update the Agent to the latest version.)

sources.title: Upgrade your Datadog Agent
sources.claim: datadog-agent version (command to check agent version)

sources.title: Upgrade your Datadog Agent
sources.claim: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install datadog-agent (command to update agent on Linux)

sources.title: Keep stakeholders informed with Datadog Status Pages
sources.claim: https://status.datadoghq.com で該当時刻に障害が報告されていないか確認 (Check https://status.datadoghq.com for reported outages at the relevant time.)

sources.title: Datadog API and Application Token Setup Guide | Cequence AI Gateway
sources.claim: API クォータの確認：Datadog コンソール → Organization Settings → API quota で現在の使用状況を確認 (Check API quota: Datadog Console → Organization Settings → API quota to check current usage.)

sources.title: New Relic vs DataDog - Features, Pricing, and Performance Compared (2026) | SigNoz
sources.claim: New Relic：APM・インフラモニタリング・ログ管理を統一プラットフォームで提供し、Datadog と同等の機能を備えています。API の安定性に定評があり、SaaS 型で管理負荷が少ないのが特徴です。(New Relic: Offers APM, infrastructure monitoring, and log management on a unified platform, with features equivalent to Datadog. It is known for API stability and is a SaaS model with low management overhead.)

sources.title: Datadog vs. New Relic: a side-by-side comparison for 2026 | Better Stack Community
sources.claim: New Relic, on the other hand, is preferred for real-time performance data analysis, support, and pricing (it's not cheaper, just easier to grasp).

sources.title: Datadog vs Dynatrace 2026: Honest Comparison From Who've Switched - Middleware.io
sources.claim: Dynatrace：自動検出と AI を活用した異常検知が強みで、大規模なマイクロサービス環境向けです。API 呼び出し追跡機能が豊富で、複雑な分散トレーシングが必要な場合に適しています。(Dynatrace: Strengths include automatic detection and AI-powered anomaly detection, suitable for large-scale microservice environments. It has rich API call tracing features and is suitable for complex distributed tracing.)

sources.title: Dynatrace vs. Datadog
sources.claim: Deterministic + causal AI with precise root cause and remediation for autonomous operations. Anomaly detection and alerting with correlation based AI and minimal automation capabilities.

sources.title: API and Application Keys - Datadog Docs
sources.claim: Datadog uses a dual authentication system that requires both an API Key and an Application Key for programmatic access: API Key: Identifies your organization and provides basic access to Datadog APIs; Application Key: Provides additional permissions and scoping for specific operations.

sources.title: Endpoint Observability - Datadog Docs
sources.claim: The API endpoint processes requests and provides the corresponding responses.

sources.title: API Reference - Datadog Docs
sources.claim: The Datadog API is an HTTP REST API. The API uses resource-oriented URLs to call the API, uses status codes to indicate the success or failure of requests, returns JSON from all requests, and uses standard HTTP...

unsupported_claims: Datadog の 500 エラーは、Datadog サービス自体の内部エラーが発生したことを示します。API リクエストはサーバーに到達しましたが、Datadog のインフラストラクチャ側で予期しない問題が発生し、リクエストを処理できない状態です。(Datadog's 500 error indicates an internal error within the Datadog service itself. The API request reached the server, but an unexpected problem occurred on Datadog's infrastructure side, making it unable to process the request.) - While generally true for a 500, a direct official Datadog statement explicitly defining their 500 error in this exact wording was not found, but it is a standard HTTP 500 definition.

大規模なデータ処理による一時的な過負荷や、Datadog 側のシステム障害が原因として考えられます。(Temporary overload due to large-scale data processing or system failure on Datadog's side are possible causes.) - This is a general statement on causes of 500 errors and is widely accepted, but a direct Datadog official doc stating these as *their specific* 500 error causes in this phrasing was not found, though related causes are mentioned.

batch_size = 500 # 1バッチあたり500メトリクスに制限 (batch_size = 500 # Limit to 500 metrics per batch) - This is presented as an example 'batch_size' in code, but no official Datadog documentation states a hard limit of 500 metrics per batch; rather, payload size limits are mentioned.

Editor's Note: Datadog の 500 エラーは公式ドキュメントでは「一時的な障害」として扱われることが多いですが、実際のフォーラムやコミュニティでの報告では、ペイロードサイズの超過やレート制限の巧妙な超過が原因であるケースが大多数です。(Datadog's 500 errors are often treated as "temporary outages" in official documentation, but reports in actual forums and communities indicate that exceeding payload size or clever rate limit exceeding are the cause in the majority of cases.) - This is a meta-claim about how official documentation and community reports differ, which is hard to officially source directly from Datadog. However, community discussions (e.g., Stack Overflow, GitHub) do support the idea of payload size leading to errors.

Editor's Note: 公式の解決策「状態ページを確認して再試行する」だけでは解決しないことが珍しくなく、特に日本国内の利用者からは「EU リージョンを指定しているのに US エンドポイントにリクエストが到達している」という報告も寄せられています。(It is not uncommon for the official solution "check status page and retry" to not resolve the issue, and reports from Japanese users, in particular, include "requests reaching US endpoints even when EU region is specified.") - This is a claim about user experience and reports, which is difficult to verify with official documentation. However, community discussions mention regional endpoint issues.
大規模なデータ処理による一時的な過負荷や、Datadog 側のシステム障害が原因として考えられます。
Error message example: {"errors": [{"status": 500, "title": "Internal Server Error", "detail": "An error occurred processing your request"}]}
HTTP ステータスコード：サーバー側の内部エラーが発生したことを示す。
エラーの分類：Datadog サービスの処理が失敗した。
詳細情報：リクエスト処理中に予期しないエラーが発生したことを示す。
Datadog のインフラストラクチャで一時的な障害が発生している場合、その復旧を待つ必要があります。
特にカスタムメトリクスやログの一括インジェストで発生しやすいです。
batch_size = 500 # 1バッチあたり500メトリクスに制限
